title.en: Ye Tian probed for a while, and was a little su...

content.en:
Ye Tian became a Void Divine Son, although he could not check the information of other Void Divine Sons, but he knew the number of Void Divine Sons.

In the Void Source Palace, it is not that there are no Void Divine Sons, but ordinary Void Sons are not qualified to know the identity of the Void Divine Sons, and many Void Divine Sons are too old, and they don't need the Void Source Tablet, so the other Void Sons think that there is no Void Divine Son in the Void Source Palace.

"Thirty-nine Void Gods!"

Ye Tian probed for a while, and was a little surprised.

I have to say that there are still quite a few Void Divine Sons, but when I think that this is the number of Void Divine Sons from the entire Source Sea, it is not much, I am afraid that it will take multiple eternal heavens and earths to give birth to a Void Divine Son.

Afterwards, he inquired into the information of the Void Divine Son.

The number of Children of the Void is very large, a total of 59,813 people, which is close to 60,000 Children of the Void.

If he hadn't become a Void Divine Son, it would have been difficult for Ye Tian to imagine that there would be so many Void Sons in the Source Sea.

"Investigate the Akiba Genjin!"

Ye Tian mobilized his authority to investigate the Akiba Genshen.

Soon, he found out that Akiba Genjin was indeed a child of the void, and did not become a son of the void.

Obviously, although the Akiba Source God has condensed the Void Source Body, the defects of the Void Source Body are a bit big, and the foundation is not very deep, so it is impossible to pass through the second layer of the Void Tower, but it should be very close to the level of the Void God Son.

......

Source sea, Yuan extreme abyss.

A first-class invincible man was cultivating on a certain level of penance, and suddenly he opened his eyes.

"I actually gave birth to another Void God Son, how long has it been since the Void God Son was born? I remember that I was the thirty-sixth Void God Son, and after 300,000 Tribulations, no more Void God Son was born. "

The man muttered.

At the same time, one Void Divine Son from all over the Source Sea learned that another Void Divine Son had been born.

However, they didn't know the identity of this Void God Son and what realm it was, so it would be very difficult to investigate.

Of course, they were not in a hurry to know the identity of this Void God Son, and there was no need to investigate.

And on the side of the Void Source Palace.

Ye Tian also began to choose his own source weapon and eternal source object, this was his reward, although he could not rush to take it, he did not need to wait.

Source device, Ye Tian is not ready to use the defense source device, although the defense source device has a good life-saving ability, but he has three chances to save his life, even the supreme can't kill him, so there is no need to choose the defense source device.

As for the attack-type source device, although it is very good, but Ye Tian's cultivation has not reached the supreme realm now, although the attack source device has helped him well, but it has not yet reached the level of several times higher all at once, plus he will not let the copy body fight with the attack source weapon, in case the copy body falls, the attack source device will be lost.

Combining many factors, Ye Tian decided to choose an escape type source device.

In this way, even if he really encounters danger in the future, his body may not need to use a chance to save his life, but can escape directly through the escape source.

"Machine spirit, filter out the source weapon of the escape class!"

Ye Tian said.

Wow!!!

One by one, the phantom of the source weapon appeared in front of Ye Tian, and there were probably dozens of escape source weapons here.

Golden Thunder Source Wing: Instantly increases the speed by dozens of times, ignoring the blockade, the flaw is extremely exhausting power, and even after use, there will be a period of weakness.

Black Aurora Shuttle: Increases speed by a hundredfold, ignores blockades, consumes little, but cannot control the direction.

Phantom Thousand Machines: Countless shadows are formed, burrowing into different time and space, and it is difficult for the enemy to discover their true identity.

......

Ye Tian looked at the source artifacts on it, and he was extremely moved.

If all of these source weapons were his, his life-saving ability was so terrifying that even the supreme with more means would not be able to kill him.

However, he could only choose one.

After selecting for a long time, Ye Tian chose the source device of the Black Aurora Shuttle.

Although it couldn't control the direction, it could only escape with Ye Tian in one direction, but as long as he could escape, he would have enough time to urge the Void Divine Son Badge to cross the long distance of the Source Sea and return to the Void Source Palace.

Therefore, the Black Aurora shuttle is more important and most suitable for him.

"Machine Spirit, I choose the Black Aurora Shuttle!"

Ye Tian chose to say.

Wow!

The phantom of the Black Aurora Shuttle became more and more condensed, and finally the real Black Aurora Shuttle fell into Ye Tian's hands like a black shuttle and became his source weapon.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to choose the Eternal Source Object.

The Void Source Hall Artifact Spirit lists a lot of Eternal Source Objects, but they are all Eternal Source Objects after the rank of a thousand, and they are incomparable to the Void Gold Mountain.

Now, he already knew that every Eternal Source Thing had a certain special value, such as the Void Gold Mountain could give birth to the Void Gold Fruit, and the Heavenly Wind Sea's Soul Blue Gold could exercise the power of the soul and enhance the strength of the soul.

Ye Tian was going to choose an eternal source object that could increase the strength of the Terran Race, so that he could make the Terran more powerful.

Abrupt.

An Eternal Source object attracted Ye Tian's attention.

Eternal Source: All things are yang!

This Eternal Source Artifact looks like just a sun on the outside, but it is a rather extraordinary Eternal Source Artifact, which constantly radiates the yang power of all things, and can slowly change the bloodline, physical body, and potential of the surrounding creatures, but it can only help the weak creatures, and has almost no effect on the creatures above the first ancestor.

Moreover, the Yang of All Things can't give birth to any good things, and a treasure like the Void Golden Fruit can't even be thought of.

In addition, the Yang of All Things will continue to radiate the Yang of all things, which is equivalent to consuming its own strength, and it needs to provide energy for the Yang of All Things frequently, otherwise after a long time, it will fall into silence and become an ordinary sun.

Because of this, the Yang of All Things is relatively average among the Eternal Source Things, ranking only 3987.

However, to a race, the Yang of All Things is a treasure far superior to other Eternal Sources.

"Machine Spirit, I choose the Yang of All Things!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With the eternal source of the Ten Thousand Yang Thing, the human race is afraid that it will be comparable to some powerful races of the eternal heaven and earth in the future in terms of potential and life essence.

At that time, the human race is afraid that after a long time, many invincible people will be born, and they will truly become a powerful race that can enter the source sea, rather than an ordinary race in an exotic world.

For Ye Tian, the value of the Yang of All Things was enough to surpass the Void Gold Mountain, an eternal source object.
